actions.prompt: What would you like to do?

header.subtitle: Your queue and verified offline files on this device

alerts.clearMessage: Are you sure? This will delete all downloaded files from your device.
alerts.clearAllMessage: This removes every managed download and its local file from this device.
alerts.clearAllConfirm: Delete every managed download and remove its local file?

sections.readySubtitle: Verified files available on this device

footer.verified: Offline items are shown as ready only after the local file is verified.

empty.title: No Downloads
empty.description: Movies and shows you download will appear here.
empty.filterDescription: Choose another filter to see the rest of the queue.

install.title: Install Add-on
install.hint: Paste a manifest.json URL to add a content source.
install.successDetail: New content will appear on Discover.

errors.torrentBridge: This is a torrent stream. Start the stream-server bridge first.
errors.bridgeBroken: The desktop bridge is reachable, but its torrent engine needs repair. Open Sources & Devices, rebuild the desktop dependencies for this Mac, then restart the app.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join Streamer to sync your library
register.name: Full Name
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.passwordUpper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
register.passwordLower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
register.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgot.success: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.
forgot.error: Could not request a reset link

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the reset token and your new password
resetPassword.emptyError: Please enter the token and a new password
resetPassword.successAlert: Password reset successfully! Please log in.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.description: Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.success: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.
verifyEmail.resendError: Failed to send. Please try again.

settings.title: Playback Settings
settings.noAudio: No selectable audio tracks — using default.

status.preparingSubtitle: This can take a moment for torrent sources.

errors.bridgeUnavailable: The desktop bridge is not ready. Open Sources & Devices to check the URL or repair the streaming engine, then try again.
errors.playbackFailed: Playback failed before the first frame could load.
errors.playbackTimeout: The stream did not produce playable video within 60 seconds. The torrent may be slow, stalled, or incompatible with this player.
errors.unsupportedCodec: This source appears to use HEVC/H.265 or Dolby Vision, which this desktop/web player cannot decode reliably. Pick an H.264/x264 source or a lower-quality MP4 instead.
